phrases.intent_en: Ask where the staircase to beach is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a escadaria para descer à praia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh es-TAH ah es-ka-da-REE-ah PAH-rah deh-SEHR ah PRAH-ah [Liaison: está a→es-TAH-nah | descer à→deh-SEHR-zee]
phrases.cultural_note: Beach access relies on historic staircases carved into the limestone.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, perto do Arco da Piedade.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH peeih-DAH-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the Arco da Piedade.

responses.english: Good morning, near the Arco da Piedade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH peeih-DAH-dih.
responses.local: Bom dia, perto do Arco da Piedade.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as escadas para a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH SHKAH-duhsh PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal do parque. Ele pode indicar o caminho para as escadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih. EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the park ranger. He can show you the way to the stairs.

responses.english: Ask the park ranger. He can show you the way to the stairs.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih. EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao fiscal do parque. Ele pode indicar o caminho para as escadas.

phrases.text_local: Fica o quiosque dos bilhetes para o passeio de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DOOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO DIH BAH-ruh-koo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal do parque sobre os bilhetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih SOHB-rih OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the park ranger about the tickets.

responses.english: Ask the park ranger about the tickets.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih SOHB-rih OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao fiscal do parque sobre os bilhetes.

phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff typically use prominent natural landmarks for quick navigation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Pesca, onde encontrará o alugador de caiaques.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh, OHNG-dih ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AW uh-loo-guh-DOHR DIH KEYEAH-kihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fishing Port, where you will find the kayak renter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fishing Port, where you will find the kayak renter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh, OHNG-dih ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AW uh-loo-guh-DOHR DIH KEYEAH-kihsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Pesca, onde encontrará o alugador de caiaques.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cliff trail starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa a caminhada no topo da falésia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee meh-SAH-mee-yah kah-mee-NYAH-dah noo TOH-poo dah-fah-LEH-zee-ah?
phrases.cultural_note: Official trailheads always feature educational signage for safety.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao painel de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW peye-NEHL DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the information board.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the information board.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW peye-NEHL DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao painel de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get life jackets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter coletes salva-vidas aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR koo-LEH-tihsh SAHL-vuh-VEE-duhsh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Safety gear distribution follows strict coastal regulations.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the staircase to beach is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a escadaria para a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The staircase to the beach is part of the Escadaria da Praia, a safe route down to the cove.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Beach Staircase.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Beach Staircase.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria da Praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cliff trail starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa exatamente o trilho das falésias?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee meh-SAH-shee eh-zah-TAHM-tee oo TREE-lyoo dah-zee fah-LEH-zee-uhs
phrases.cultural_note: Trail access points are clearly marked near official viewing platforms.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao miradouro principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main viewpoint.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao miradouro principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the boat ticket kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de bilhetes para barcos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh BAH-ruh-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tour tickets are typically sold at a kiosk near the cliff area; the exact location may vary seasonally.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Pesca.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fishing port.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fishing port.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Pesca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach stairs are
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Escadaria da Praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Escadaria da Praia is a well-known landmark at Ponta da Piedade, often used to access the beach.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the beach stairs.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the beach stairs.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria da Praia.

phrases.text_local: Como chegar às Grutas e Arcos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR UHUHSH GROO-tuhsh EH AH-ruh-koosh?

likely_response.local: Siga o Trilho das Falésias ou pergunte a um guia de trilho.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AW TREE-lyoo DUHSH fuh-LEH-zeeuhsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DIH TREE-lyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the Cliff Trail or ask a trail guide.

responses.english: Follow the Cliff Trail or ask a trail guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AW TREE-lyoo DUHSH fuh-LEH-zeeuhsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DIH TREE-lyoo.
responses.local: Siga o Trilho das Falésias ou pergunte a um guia de trilho.

phrases.cultural_note: Miradouro da Piedade is a popular cliff-top viewpoint with stunning ocean views.
